rulebooks.section_name: BP-1 개요 – 지속가능성 보고서 준비의 일반 근거
rulebooks.section_content:
The undertaking shall disclose the general basis for preparation of its sustainability statement.

The objective of this Disclosure Requirement is to provide an understanding of how the undertaking prepares its sustainability statement, including the scope of consolidation, the upstream and downstream value chain information and, where relevant, whether the undertaking has used any of the options for omitting information referred to in points d) and e) in the following paragraph.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 보고서의 일반 준비 근거에 대한 서술이 존재하는지
하위 공시(a~e)로의 연결 또는 요약이 명시되는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1 General basis for preparation (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-1-A 통합 또는 개별 기준
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking shall disclose: (a) whether the sustainability statement has been prepared on a consolidated or individual basis.

required_actions.description: 지속가능성 보고서가 통합 기준으로 작성되었는지, 개별 기준으로 작성되었는지 명시

verification_checks.description: 통합(consolidated) 또는 개별(individual) 중 하나가 명확히 기재되었는지
둘 다 해당하거나 불명확한 표현이 없는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1-A Consolidated or individual basis

rulebooks.section_name: BP-1-B 개요 – 통합 지속가능성 보고서(범위·면제 자회사)
rulebooks.section_content: For consolidated sustainability statements: (i) confirmation that the scope of consolidation is the same as for the financial statements, or where applicable a declaration per Article 48i of Directive 2013/34/EU; and (ii) where applicable, an indication of which subsidiary undertakings are exempted per Articles 19a(9) or 29a(8).
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1-B Consolidated sustainability statements (scope, exempted subsidiaries) – overview

rulebooks.section_name: BP-1-B-(i) 통합 범위 확인 또는 제48i조 선언
rulebooks.section_content: (i) a confirmation that the scope of consolidation is the same as for the financial statements, or, where applicable, a declaration that the reporting undertaking is not required to draw-up financial statements or that the reporting undertaking is preparing consolidated sustainability reporting pursuant to Article 48i of Directive 2013/34/EU.

required_actions.description: 통합 범위가 재무제표와 동일함을 확인하거나, 해당 시 재무제표 작성 불요/제48i조에 따른 통합 지속가능성 보고 선언

conditional_requirements.requirement: (i) 통합 범위 확인 또는 선언 필수

verification_checks.description: 통합 범위 = 재무제표 동일 확인 또는 제48i조 선언이 있는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1-B-(i) Scope of consolidation confirmation or Article 48i declaration

rulebooks.section_name: BP-1-B-(ii) 면제된 자회사 표시
rulebooks.section_content: (ii) where applicable, an indication of which subsidiary undertakings included in the consolidation are exempted from individual or consolidated sustainability reporting pursuant to Articles 19a(9) or 29a(8) of Directive 2013/34/EU.

required_actions.description: 해당 시 제19a(9)조 또는 제29a(8)조에 따라 면제된 자회사 표시

verification_checks.description: 면제된 자회사가 있는 경우 해당 자회사가 표시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1-B-(ii) Indication of exempted subsidiary undertakings

rulebooks.section_name: BP-1-C 가치사슬 커버리지 범위
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking shall disclose: (c) to what extent the sustainability statement covers the undertaking's upstream and downstream value chain (see ESRS 1 section 5.1 Reporting undertaking and value chain).

related_concepts: ESRS 1 section 5.1 Reporting undertaking and value chain

required_actions.description: 상류·하류 가치사슬을 지속가능성 보고서가 어느 정도까지 다루는지 공시

verification_checks.description: 가치사슬 커버리지(범위·정도)에 대한 서술이 있는지
상류 및/또는 하류 가치사슬이 언급되는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1-C Value chain coverage

rulebooks.section_name: BP-1-D 지적재산권·노하우·혁신 결과 정보 생략 옵션
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking shall disclose: (d) whether the undertaking has used the option to omit a specific piece of information corresponding to intellectual property, know-how or the results of innovation (see ESRS 1 section 7.7 Classified and sensitive information and information on intellectual property, know-how or results of innovation).

required_actions.description: 지적재산권·노하우·혁신 결과에 해당하는 정보 생략 옵션을 사용했는지 여부 공시

verification_checks.description: 옵션 사용 여부(예/아니오 또는 동등한 명시)가 기재되었는지
생략을 사용한 경우 해당 사실이 명시되고 ESRS 1 §7.7 준수가 언급되는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1-D Option to omit information (IP, know-how, innovation)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-1-E 임박한 발전·협상 중인 사항 공시 면제
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking shall disclose: (e) for undertakings based in an EU member state that allows for the exemption from disclosure of impending developments or matters in the course of negotiation, as provided for in articles 19a(3) and 29a(3) of Directive 2013/34/EU, whether the undertaking has used that exemption.

key_terms: matters in the course of negotiation

required_actions.description: EU 회원국이 면제를 허용하는 경우, 해당 면제를 사용했는지 여부 공시

verification_checks.description: EU 회원국 소재 기업이며 해당 회원국이 면제를 허용하는 경우에만 (e) 적용
면제를 사용했는지 여부가 명확히 기재되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-1-E Exemption for impending developments or matters in negotiation

rulebooks.section_name: AR 1 – 가치사슬 커버리지 설명 시 구분(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: When describing to what extent the sustainability statement covers the undertaking's upstream and downstream value chain (see ESRS 1 section 5.1), the undertaking may distinguish between: (a) the extent to which its materiality assessment of impacts, risks and opportunities extends to its upstream and/or downstream value chain; (b) the extent to which its policies, actions and targets extend to its value chain; and (c) the extent to which it includes upstream and/or downstream value chain data when disclosing on metrics.

verification_checks.description: 가치사슬 커버리지 설명 시 (a)(b)(c) 구분 공시 여부(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 1 Value chain coverage – distinction (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 1(a) 물질성 평가의 가치사슬 적용 범위
rulebooks.section_content: AR 1(a): the extent to which its materiality assessment of impacts, risks and opportunities extends to its upstream and/or downstream value chain.

verification_checks.description: 물질성 평가의 가치사슬 적용 범위 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 1(a) Extent materiality assessment extends to value chain

rulebooks.section_name: AR 1(b) 정책·조치·목표의 가치사슬 적용 범위
rulebooks.section_content: AR 1(b): the extent to which its policies, actions and targets extend to its value chain.

verification_checks.description: 정책·조치·목표의 가치사슬 적용 범위 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 1(b) Extent policies, actions and targets extend to value chain

rulebooks.section_name: AR 1(c) 지표 공시 시 가치사슬 데이터 포함 범위
rulebooks.section_content: AR 1(c): the extent to which it includes upstream and/or downstream value chain data when disclosing on metrics.

verification_checks.description: 지표 공시 시 가치사슬 데이터 포함 범위 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 1(c) Extent value chain data included when disclosing on metrics

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2 개요 – 특정 상황과 관련된 공시
rulebooks.section_content: Para 6: The undertaking shall provide disclosures in relation to specific circumstances. Para 7 (objective): to provide an understanding of the effect of these specific circumstances on the preparation of the sustainability statement. Para 8: The undertaking may report this information alongside the disclosures to which they refer.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2 Disclosures in relation to specific circumstances (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-9 개요 – 시간 범위(중·장기)
rulebooks.section_content: When the undertaking has deviated from the medium- or long-term time horizons defined by ESRS 1 section 6.4, it shall describe: (a) its definitions of medium- or long-term time horizons; and (b) the reasons for applying those definitions.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-9 Time horizons (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-9-(a) 중·장기 시간 범위의 정의
rulebooks.section_content: (a) its definitions of medium- or long-term time horizons.

verification_checks.description: 중·장기 시간 범위에 대한 정의가 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-9-(a) Definitions of medium- or long-term time horizons

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-9-(b) 해당 정의를 적용한 이유
rulebooks.section_content: (b) the reasons for applying those definitions.

verification_checks.description: 해당 정의 적용 이유가 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-9-(b) Reasons for applying those definitions

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-10 개요 – 가치사슬 추정
rulebooks.section_content: When metrics include upstream and/or downstream value chain data estimated using indirect sources (e.g. sector-average data or other proxies), the undertaking shall: (a) identify the metrics; (b) describe the basis for preparation; (c) describe the resulting level of accuracy; and (d) where applicable, describe the planned actions to improve the accuracy in the future (see ESRS 1 chapter 5 Value chain).
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-10 Value chain estimation (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-10-(a) 해당 지표 식별
rulebooks.section_content: (a) identify the metrics.

verification_checks.description: 간접 추정을 사용한 지표가 식별되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-10-(a) Identify the metrics

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-10-(b) 준비 근거 설명
rulebooks.section_content: (b) describe the basis for preparation.

verification_checks.description: 준비 근거에 대한 설명이 있는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-10-(b) Describe the basis for preparation

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-10-(c) 정확도 수준 설명
rulebooks.section_content: (c) describe the resulting level of accuracy.

verification_checks.description: 정확도 수준에 대한 설명이 있는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-10-(c) Describe the resulting level of accuracy

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-10-(d) 정확도 개선을 위한 계획된 조치
rulebooks.section_content: (d) where applicable, describe the planned actions to improve the accuracy in the future (see ESRS 1 chapter 5 Value chain).

verification_checks.description: 해당 시 향후 정확도 개선을 위한 계획된 조치가 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-10-(d) Planned actions to improve accuracy (where applicable)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-11 개요 – 추정 및 결과 불확실성의 근거
rulebooks.section_content: In accordance with ESRS 1 section 7.2 Sources of estimation and outcome uncertainty, the undertaking shall: (a) identify the quantitative metrics and monetary amounts subject to a high level of measurement uncertainty; (b) in relation to each: (i) disclose information about the sources of measurement uncertainty; and (ii) disclose the assumptions, approximations and judgements made in measuring it.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-11 Sources of estimation and outcome uncertainty (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-11-(a) 측정 불확실성이 높은 지표·금액 식별
rulebooks.section_content: (a) identify the quantitative metrics and monetary amounts it has disclosed that are subject to a high level of measurement uncertainty.

verification_checks.description: 측정 불확실성이 높은 지표·금액이 식별되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-11-(a) Identify metrics and amounts subject to high measurement uncertainty

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-11-(b)(i) 측정 불확실성의 근거
rulebooks.section_content: (b)(i) disclose information about the sources of measurement uncertainty (for example, the dependence of the amount on the outcome of a future event, on a measurement technique or on the availability and quality of data from the entity's upstream and/or downstream value chain).

verification_checks.description: 측정 불확실성의 근거에 대한 정보가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-11-(b)(i) Sources of measurement uncertainty

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-11-(b)(ii) 가정·추정·판단 공시
rulebooks.section_content: (b)(ii) disclose the assumptions, approximations and judgements the entity has made in measuring it.

verification_checks.description: 가정·추정·판단이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-11-(b)(ii) Assumptions, approximations and judgements

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-12 전망 정보의 불확실성 표시(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: Para 12: When disclosing forward-looking information, the undertaking may indicate that it considers such information to be uncertain.

verification_checks.description: 전망 정보가 불확실함을 표시했는지(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-12 Indication that forward-looking information is uncertain (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-13 개요 – 지속가능성 정보의 준비·표시 변경
rulebooks.section_content: When changes in the preparation and presentation of sustainability information occur compared to the previous reporting period(s) (see ESRS 1 section 7.4), the undertaking shall: (a) explain the changes and the reasons for them, including why the replaced metric provides more useful information; (b) disclose revised comparative figures, unless impracticable—if impracticable, disclose that fact; and (c) disclose the difference between the figure disclosed in the preceding period and the revised comparative figure.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-13 Changes in preparation or presentation of sustainability information (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-13-(a) 변경 내용 및 사유 설명
rulebooks.section_content: (a) explain the changes and the reasons for them, including why the replaced metric provides more useful information.

verification_checks.description: 변경 내용 및 사유(대체 지표의 유용성 포함)가 설명되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-13-(a) Explain the changes and the reasons

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-13-(b) 수정된 비교 수치 공시
rulebooks.section_content: (b) disclose revised comparative figures, unless it is impracticable to do so. When it is impracticable to adjust comparative information for one or more prior periods, the undertaking shall disclose that fact.

verification_checks.description: 수정된 비교 수치가 공시되었거나, 불가능한 경우 그 사실이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-13-(b) Disclose revised comparative figures

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-13-(c) 전기 공시 수치와 수정 비교 수치의 차이
rulebooks.section_content: (c) disclose the difference between the figure disclosed in the preceding period and the revised comparative figure.

verification_checks.description: 전기 공시 수치와 수정 비교 수치의 차이가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-13-(c) Disclose the difference between preceding and revised figure

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-14 개요 – 이전 기간의 보고 오류
rulebooks.section_content: When the undertaking identifies material prior period errors (see ESRS 1 section 7.5 Reporting errors in prior periods), it shall disclose: (a) the nature of the prior period material error; (b) to the extent practicable, the correction for each prior period included in the sustainability statement; and (c) if correction of the error is not practicable, the circumstances that led to the existence of that condition.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-14 Reporting errors in prior periods (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-14-(a) 이전 기간 중요 오류의 성격
rulebooks.section_content: (a) the nature of the prior period material error.

verification_checks.description: 이전 기간 중요 오류의 성격이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-14-(a) Nature of the prior period material error

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-14-(b) 각 이전 기간에 대한 수정
rulebooks.section_content: (b) to the extent practicable, the correction for each prior period included in the sustainability statement.

verification_checks.description: 가능한 범위에서 각 이전 기간에 대한 수정이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-14-(b) Correction for each prior period

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-14-(c) 수정이 불가능한 경우의 상황
rulebooks.section_content: (c) if correction of the error is not practicable, the circumstances that led to the existence of that condition.

verification_checks.description: 수정이 불가능한 경우 해당 상황이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-14-(c) Circumstances when correction is not practicable

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-15 다른 법규 또는 일반적으로 인정된 보고 기준에 따른 공시
rulebooks.section_content: When the undertaking includes in its sustainability statement information stemming from other legislation which requires the undertaking to disclose sustainability information or from generally accepted sustainability reporting standards and frameworks (see ESRS 1 section 8.2), it shall disclose this fact. In case of partial application of other reporting standards or frameworks, the undertaking shall provide a precise reference to the paragraphs of the standard or framework applied.

verification_checks.description: 타 법규·기준 사용 사실 또는 부분 적용 시 해당 조항에 대한 정확한 참조가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-15 Disclosures from other legislation or generally accepted pronouncements

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-16 인용에 의한 편입
rulebooks.section_content: When the undertaking incorporates information by reference (see ESRS 1 section 9.1 Incorporation by reference), it shall disclose a list of the disclosure requirements of ESRS, or the specific datapoints mandated by a Disclosure Requirement, that have been incorporated by reference.

verification_checks.description: 인용에 의해 편입된 ESRS 공시 요구사항 또는 데이터포인트 목록이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-16 Incorporation by reference

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-17 개요 – ESRS 1 부록 C 단계적 적용
rulebooks.section_content: If an undertaking or group not exceeding 750 employees (average during the financial year) on its balance sheet date decides to omit the information required by ESRS E4, S1, S2, S3 or S4 in accordance with Appendix C of ESRS 1, it shall nevertheless disclose whether the sustainability topics covered by ESRS E4, S1, S2, S3 and S4 have been assessed to be material. If one or more of these topics has been assessed to be material, the undertaking shall, for each material topic: (a) list of material matters and how business model and strategy take account of impacts; (b) time-bound targets, progress, biodiversity/ecosystem targets based on scientific evidence; (c) policies; (d) actions and result; (e) metrics.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-17 Use of phase-in provisions (Appendix C) (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-17-(a) 중요 사항 목록 및 사업모델·전략에서의 반영
rulebooks.section_content: (a) disclose the list of matters (topic, sub-topic or sub-sub-topic) in AR 16 ESRS 1 Appendix A that are assessed to be material and briefly describe how the undertaking's business model and strategy take account of the impacts related to those matters.

verification_checks.description: 중요 사항 목록 및 사업모델·전략에서의 영향 반영이 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-17-(a) List of material matters and how business model and strategy take account of impacts

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-17-(b) 기한부 목표·이행 현황·생물다양성 근거
rulebooks.section_content: (b) briefly describe any time-bound targets related to the matters in question, the progress made towards achieving those targets, and whether its targets related to biodiversity and ecosystems are based on conclusive scientific evidence.

verification_checks.description: 기한부 목표·이행 현황·생물다양성 목표의 과학적 근거가 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-17-(b) Time-bound targets, progress, biodiversity targets based on scientific evidence

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-17-(c) 해당 사항에 대한 정책
rulebooks.section_content: (c) briefly describe its policies in relation to the matters in question.

verification_checks.description: 해당 사항에 대한 정책이 간략히 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-17-(c) Policies in relation to the matters in question

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-17-(d) 부정적 영향 식별·감시·예방·완화·구제 조치
rulebooks.section_content: (d) briefly describe actions it has taken to identify, monitor, prevent, mitigate, remediate or bring an end to actual or potential adverse impacts related to the matters in question, and the result of such actions.

verification_checks.description: 조치 및 그 결과가 간략히 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-17-(d) Actions to identify, monitor, prevent, mitigate, remediate or bring an end to adverse impacts

rulebooks.section_name: BP-2-17-(e) 해당 사항과 관련된 지표
rulebooks.section_content: (e) disclose metrics relevant to the matters in question.

verification_checks.description: 해당 사항과 관련된 지표가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: BP-2-17-(e) Metrics relevant to the matters in question

rulebooks.section_name: AR 2 – 유럽 표준 의존·외부 검증 및 표준 적합성(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking may disclose whether it relies on any European standards approved by the European Standardisation System (ISO/IEC or CEN/CENELEC standards), as well as the extent to which data and processes that are used for sustainability reporting purposes have been verified by an external assurance provider and found to conform to the corresponding ISO/IEC or CEN/CENELEC standard.

verification_checks.description: 유럽 표준 의존·외부 검증·표준 적합성 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 2 European standards and external assurance (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1 개요 – 행정·경영·감독 기관의 역할
rulebooks.section_content: Para 18: The objective of this chapter is to set disclosure requirements that enable an understanding of the governance processes, controls and procedures put in place to monitor, manage and oversee sustainability matters. Para 19: The undertaking shall disclose the composition of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies, their roles and responsibilities and access to expertise and skills with regard to sustainability matters. Para 20 (objective): (a) composition and diversity; (b) roles and responsibilities in exercising oversight of the process to manage material impacts, risks and opportunities, including management's role; (c) expertise and skills on sustainability matters or access to such expertise and skills.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1 The role of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-21 개요 – 구성 및 다양성
rulebooks.section_content: Para 21: The undertaking shall disclose the following information about the composition and diversity of the members of the undertaking's administrative, management and supervisory bodies: (a) the number of executive and non-executive members; (b) representation of employees and other workers; (c) experience relevant to the sectors, products and geographic locations; (d) percentage by gender and other aspects of diversity (board gender diversity as average ratio of female to male board members); and (e) the percentage of independent board members.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-21 Composition and diversity (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-21-(a) 집행·비집행 위원 수
rulebooks.section_content: (a) the number of executive and non-executive members.

verification_checks.description: 집행·비집행 위원 수가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-21-(a) Number of executive and non-executive members

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-21-(b) 직원 및 기타 근로자 대표
rulebooks.section_content: (b) representation of employees and other workers.

verification_checks.description: 직원·기타 근로자 대표가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-21-(b) Representation of employees and other workers

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-21-(c) 섹터·제품·지역별 관련 경험
rulebooks.section_content: (c) experience relevant to the sectors, products and geographic locations of the undertaking.

verification_checks.description: 섹터·제품·지역별 관련 경험이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-21-(c) Experience relevant to sectors, products and geographic locations

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-21-(d) 성별 및 기타 다양성 비율
rulebooks.section_content: (d) percentage by gender and other aspects of diversity that the undertaking considers. The board's gender diversity shall be calculated as an average ratio of female to male board members.

verification_checks.description: 성별·기타 다양성 비율(이사회 성비 평균)이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-21-(d) Percentage by gender and other aspects of diversity

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-21-(e) 독립 이사회 위원 비율
rulebooks.section_content: (e) the percentage of independent board members. For undertakings with a unitary board, this corresponds to the percentage of independent non-executive board members. For undertakings with a dual board, it corresponds to the percentage of independent members of the supervisory body.

verification_checks.description: 독립 이사회 위원 비율이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-21-(e) Percentage of independent board members

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22 개요 – 역할 및 책임
rulebooks.section_content: Para 22: The undertaking shall disclose the following information about the roles and responsibilities of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies: (a) identity of bodies or individual(s) responsible for oversight of IROs; (b) how responsibilities are reflected in terms of reference, board mandates and policies; (c) description of management's role including (i) delegation and oversight, (ii) reporting lines, (iii) dedicated controls and procedures and integration; (d) how bodies and senior management oversee target-setting and monitor progress.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22 Roles and responsibilities (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22-(a) 영향·리스크·기회 감독 담당 기관 또는 개인 식별
rulebooks.section_content: (a) the identity of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies (such as a board committee or similar) or individual(s) within a body responsible for oversight of impacts, risks and opportunities.

verification_checks.description: IRO 감독 담당 기관 또는 개인이 식별·공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22-(a) Identity of bodies or individual(s) responsible for oversight of IROs

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22-(b) 역할이 정관·이사회 권한 등에 반영된 방식
rulebooks.section_content: (b) how each body's or individual's responsibilities for impacts, risks and opportunities are reflected in the undertaking's terms of reference, board mandates and other related policies.

verification_checks.description: 역할이 정관·이사회 권한·정책에 반영된 방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22-(b) How responsibilities are reflected in terms of reference, board mandates and policies

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22-(c) 개요 – 경영진의 역할 설명
rulebooks.section_content: (c) a description of management's role in the governance processes, controls and procedures used to monitor, manage and oversee impacts, risks and opportunities, including: (i) whether that role is delegated to a specific management-level position or committee and how oversight is exercised over that position or committee; (ii) information about the reporting lines to the administrative, management and supervisory bodies; (iii) whether dedicated controls and procedures are applied to the management of impacts, risks and opportunities and, if so, how they are integrated with other internal functions.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22-(c) Description of management's role in governance processes (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22-(c)(i) 특정 직위·위원회 위임 여부 및 감독 방식
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(i) whether that role is delegated to a specific management-level position or committee and how oversight is exercised over that position or committee.

verification_checks.description: 위임 여부 및 감독 방식이 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22-(c)(i) Whether role is delegated and how oversight is exercised

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22-(c)(ii) 보고 라인
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(ii) information about the reporting lines to the administrative, management and supervisory bodies.

verification_checks.description: 보고 라인에 대한 정보가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22-(c)(ii) Reporting lines to the bodies

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22-(c)(iii) 전담 통제·절차 및 타 내부 기능과의 통합
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(iii) whether dedicated controls and procedures are applied to the management of impacts, risks and opportunities and, if so, how they are integrated with other internal functions.

verification_checks.description: 전담 통제·절차 및 타 기능과의 통합이 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22-(c)(iii) Dedicated controls and procedures and integration

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-22-(d) 목표 설정 감독 및 이행 현황 모니터링
rulebooks.section_content: (d) how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies and senior executive management oversee the setting of targets related to material impacts, risks and opportunities, and how they monitor progress towards them.

verification_checks.description: 목표 설정 감독 및 이행 현황 모니터링 방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-22-(d) How bodies and senior management oversee target-setting and monitor progress

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-23 개요 – 지속가능성 관련 역량 및 전문성
rulebooks.section_content: Para 23: The disclosure shall include a description of how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies determine whether appropriate skills and expertise are available or will be developed to oversee sustainability matters, including: (a) the sustainability-related expertise that the bodies, as a whole, either directly possess or can leverage (e.g. through access to experts or training); and (b) how those skills and expertise relate to the undertaking's material impacts, risks and opportunities.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-23 Skills and expertise on sustainability matters (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-23-(a) 지속가능성 관련 전문성(보유 또는 활용)
rulebooks.section_content: (a) the sustainability-related expertise that the bodies, as a whole, either directly possess or can leverage, for example through access to experts or training.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 관련 전문성(보유 또는 활용)이 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-23-(a) Sustainability-related expertise that bodies possess or can leverage

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-1-23-(b) 역량·전문성과 중요 IRO의 연관성
rulebooks.section_content: (b) how those skills and expertise relate to the undertaking's material impacts, risks and opportunities.

verification_checks.description: 역량·전문성과 중요 IRO의 연관성이 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-1-23-(b) How skills and expertise relate to material IROs

rulebooks.section_name: AR 3 – 역할·책임 설명 시 명시 가능 사항(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: In describing the role and responsibilities of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies with regard to sustainability matters, the undertaking may specify: (a) the aspects of sustainability over which oversight is exercised (i. assessment of and changes to sustainability-related aspects of strategy and business model; ii. identification and assessment of material risks, opportunities and impacts; iii. related policies and targets, action plans and dedicated resources; iv. sustainability reporting); (b) the form such oversight takes: information, consultation or decision-making; (c) the way such oversight is organised and formalised.

verification_checks.description: 역할·책임 설명 시 (a)(b)(c) 명시 여부(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 3 Role and responsibilities – may specify (a)(b)(c) (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 3(a) 감독이 행사되는 지속가능성 측면
rulebooks.section_content: AR 3(a): the aspects of sustainability over which oversight is exercised: (i) assessment of and changes to sustainability-related aspects of strategy and business model; (ii) identification and assessment of material risks, opportunities and impacts; (iii) related policies and targets, action plans and dedicated resources; (iv) sustainability reporting.

verification_checks.description: 감독 대상 측면(i~iv) 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 3(a) Aspects of sustainability over which oversight is exercised

rulebooks.section_name: AR 3(b) 감독의 형태
rulebooks.section_content: AR 3(b): the form such oversight takes for each of the above aspects: i.e., information, consultation or decision-making.

verification_checks.description: 감독 형태(정보·자문·의사결정) 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 3(b) Form such oversight takes

rulebooks.section_name: AR 3(c) 감독의 조직·형식화 방식
rulebooks.section_content: AR 3(c): the way such oversight is organised and formalised, i.e., processes by which the administrative, management and supervisory bodies engage with these aspects of sustainability.

verification_checks.description: 감독의 조직·형식화 방식 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 3(c) Way oversight is organised and formalised

rulebooks.section_name: AR 4 – 거버넌스 구조 설명의 도표 보완(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: In describing the undertaking's organisation of governance regarding sustainability matters, a description of complex governance structure may be complemented by their presentation in the form of a diagram.

verification_checks.description: 복잡한 거버넌스 구조 설명 시 도표 보완 여부(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 4 Governance structure – diagram (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 5 – 전문성 설명의 구체화·물질적 IRO 연관·기타 전문성 원천
rulebooks.section_content: The description of the level of expertise or access to expertise may be substantiated by illustrating the composition of the bodies, including members on whom these bodies rely for expertise to oversee sustainability matters, and how they leverage that expertise as a body. In the description, the undertaking shall consider how the expertise and skills are relevant to the undertaking's material impacts, risks and opportunities and whether the bodies and/or its members have access to other sources of expertise, such as specific experts and training and other educational initiatives to update and develop sustainability-related expertise within these bodies.

verification_checks.description: 전문성 구체화(선택) 및 물질적 IRO 연관·기타 전문성 원천 고려(필수)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 5 Expertise – substantiation and consideration

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-2 개요 – 기관에 제공된 정보 및 기관이 다룬 지속가능성 사항
rulebooks.section_content: Para 24: The undertaking shall disclose how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about sustainability matters and how these matters were addressed during the reporting period. Para 25 (objective): to provide an understanding of how the bodies are informed about sustainability matters, what information and matters they addressed during the reporting period, and whether the members of these bodies were adequately informed and able to fulfil their roles.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-2 Information provided to and sustainability matters addressed by the bodies (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-2-26 개요 – 공시 항목
rulebooks.section_content: Para 26: The undertaking shall disclose the following information: (a) whether, by whom and how frequently the bodies are informed about material IROs (see IRO-1), due diligence implementation, and results and effectiveness of policies, actions, metrics and targets; (b) how the bodies consider IROs when overseeing strategy, major transactions and risk management, including trade-offs; and (c) a list of the material IROs addressed by the bodies or their relevant committees during the reporting period.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-2-26 Information to be disclosed (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-2-26-(a) 기관에의 정보 제공 여부·제공자·빈도
rulebooks.section_content: (a) whether, by whom and how frequently the administrative, management and supervisory bodies, including their relevant committees, are informed about material impacts, risks and opportunities (see Disclosure Requirement IRO-1), the implementation of due diligence, and the results and effectiveness of policies, actions, metrics and targets adopted to address them.

verification_checks.description: 기관이 누구로부터 얼마나 자주 정보를 제공받는지 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-2-26-(a) Whether, by whom and how frequently the bodies are informed

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-2-26-(b) 전략·주요 거래·리스크 관리에서 IRO 고려 방식
rulebooks.section_content: (b) how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies consider impacts, risks and opportunities when overseeing the undertaking's strategy, its decisions on major transactions, and its risk management process, including whether they have considered trade-offs associated with those impacts, risks and opportunities.

verification_checks.description: 전략·주요 거래·리스크 관리 시 IRO(및 트레이드오프) 고려 방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-2-26-(b) How the bodies consider IROs when overseeing strategy, major transactions and risk management

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-2-26-(c) 보고 기간 중 기관이 다룬 중요 IRO 목록
rulebooks.section_content: (c) a list of the material impacts, risks and opportunities addressed by the administrative, management and supervisory bodies, or their relevant committees during the reporting period.

verification_checks.description: 보고 기간 중 기관이 다룬 중요 IRO 목록이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-2-26-(c) List of material IROs addressed by the bodies during the reporting period

rulebooks.section_name: AR 6 – 성과 모니터링 메커니즘 확보(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: Depending on the undertaking's structure, the administrative, management and supervisory bodies may focus on overarching targets, while management focuses on the more detailed targets. In this case, the undertaking may disclose how the governance bodies ensure that an appropriate mechanism for performance monitoring is in place.

verification_checks.description: 성과 모니터링 메커니즘 확보 방식 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 6 GOV-2 Performance monitoring mechanism (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-3 개요 – 인센티브 제도에의 지속가능성 관련 성과 통합
rulebooks.section_content: Para 27: The undertaking shall disclose information about the integration of its sustainability-related performance in incentive schemes. Para 28 (objective): to provide an understanding of whether incentive schemes are offered to members of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies that are linked to sustainability matters.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-3 Integration of sustainability-related performance in incentive schemes (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-3-29 개요 – 인센티브·보수 정책(지속가능성 연계)
rulebooks.section_content: Para 29: The undertaking shall disclose the following information about the incentive schemes and remuneration policies linked to sustainability matters for members of the undertaking's administrative, management and supervisory bodies, where they exist: (a) key characteristics of the incentive schemes; (b) whether performance is assessed against specific sustainability-related targets and/or impacts, and if so, which ones; (c) whether and how sustainability-related performance metrics are considered as benchmarks or included in remuneration policies; (d) the proportion of variable remuneration dependent on sustainability-related targets and/or impacts; and (e) the level in the undertaking at which the terms of incentive schemes are approved and updated.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-3-29 Incentive schemes and remuneration linked to sustainability (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-3-29-(a) 인센티브 제도의 주요 특성
rulebooks.section_content: (a) a description of the key characteristics of the incentive schemes.

verification_checks.description: 인센티브 제도의 주요 특성이 서술되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-3-29-(a) Key characteristics of the incentive schemes

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-3-29-(b) 지속가능성 관련 목표·영향에 대한 성과 평가 여부
rulebooks.section_content: (b) whether performance is being assessed against specific sustainability-related targets and/or impacts, and if so, which ones.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 관련 목표·영향에 대한 성과 평가 여부(및 해당 목표)가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-3-29-(b) Whether performance is assessed against sustainability-related targets and/or impacts

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-3-29-(c) 지속가능성 성과 지표의 벤치마크·보수 정책 반영
rulebooks.section_content: (c) whether and how sustainability-related performance metrics are considered as performance benchmarks or included in remuneration policies.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 성과 지표의 벤치마크·보수 정책 반영 여부 및 방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-3-29-(c) Whether and how sustainability-related metrics are in benchmarks or remuneration

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-3-29-(d) 지속가능성 관련 목표·영향에 연동된 변동 보수 비율
rulebooks.section_content: (d) the proportion of variable remuneration dependent on sustainability-related targets and/or impacts.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 관련 목표·영향에 연동된 변동 보수 비율이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-3-29-(d) Proportion of variable remuneration dependent on sustainability-related targets and/or impacts

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-3-29-(e) 인센티브 제도 조건의 승인·갱신 수준
rulebooks.section_content: (e) the level in the undertaking at which the terms of incentive schemes are approved and updated.

verification_checks.description: 인센티브 제도 조건의 승인·갱신 수준이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.section_name: AR 7 – 상장 기업 보수 보고서와의 정합성·인용(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: For listed undertakings, this Disclosure Requirement should be consistent with the remuneration report prescribed in articles 9a and 9b of Directive 2007/36/EC on the exercise of certain rights of shareholders in listed companies. Subject to the provisions of ESRS 1, paragraphs 119, 120 and 122, a listed undertaking may make a reference to its remuneration report.

verification_checks.description: 상장 기업의 보수 보고서 정합성·인용 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 7 GOV-3 Listed undertakings and remuneration report (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-4 실사에 관한 성명
rulebooks.section_content: Para 30: The undertaking shall disclose a mapping of the information provided in its sustainability statement about the due diligence process. Para 31 (objective): to facilitate an understanding of the undertaking's due diligence process with regard to sustainability matters. Para 32: The main aspects and steps of due diligence referred to under ESRS 1 chapter 4 Due diligence are related to a number of cross-cutting and topical Disclosure Requirements under the ESRS. The undertaking shall provide a mapping that explains how and where its application of the main aspects and steps of the due diligence process are reflected in its sustainability statement, to allow a depiction of the actual practices of the undertaking with regard to due diligence. Para 33: This disclosure requirement does not mandate any specific behavioural requirements with regard to due diligence actions and does not extend or modify the role of administrative, management and supervisory bodies as mandated by other legislation or regulation.

key_terms: main aspects and steps of due diligence

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 보고서 내 실사 프로세스 관련 정보에 대한 매핑이 공시되었는지
실사의 주요 측면·단계가 지속가능성 보고서에서 어떻게·어디에 반영되었는지 설명되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-4 Statement on due diligence

rulebooks.section_name: AR 8 – 실사 매핑의 표 형태 제시(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: The mapping required by paragraph 30 may be presented in the form of a table, cross-referencing the core elements of due diligence, for impacts on people and the environment, to the relevant disclosures in the undertaking's sustainability statement.

verification_checks.description: 실사 매핑을 표 형태로 제시 여부(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 8 GOV-4 Mapping in the form of a table (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 9 – 사람·환경에 대한 공시 구분을 위한 추가 열(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking may include additional columns to the table to clearly identify those disclosures that relate to impacts on people and/or the environment given that, in some cases, more than one disclosure may provide information about the same due diligence step.

verification_checks.description: 사람·환경 공시 구분용 추가 열 포함 여부(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 9 GOV-4 Additional columns for people/environment (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 10 – UNGP·OECD MNE와 실사 핵심 요소 참조
rulebooks.section_content: The main references in the international instruments of the UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights and the OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises to the core elements of the due diligence process are listed in ESRS 1 chapter 4.

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-4 Core element (e) Tracking effectiveness and communicating

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-5 개요 – 지속가능성 보고 관련 리스크 관리 및 내부통제
rulebooks.section_content: Para 34: The undertaking shall disclose the main features of its risk management and internal control system in relation to the sustainability reporting process. Para 35 (objective): to provide an understanding of the undertaking's risk management and internal control processes in relation to sustainability reporting.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-5 Risk management and internal controls over sustainability reporting (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-5-36 개요 – 공시 항목
rulebooks.section_content: Para 36: The undertaking shall disclose the following information: (a) the scope, main features and components of the risk management and internal control processes and systems in relation to sustainability reporting; (b) the risk assessment approach followed, including the risk prioritisation methodology; (c) the main risks identified and their mitigation strategies including related controls; (d) how the undertaking integrates the findings of its risk assessment and internal controls into relevant internal functions and processes; and (e) the periodic reporting of those findings to the administrative, management and supervisory bodies.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-5-36 Information to be disclosed (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-5-36-(a) 범위·주요 특성·구성요소
rulebooks.section_content: (a) the scope, main features and components of the risk management and internal control processes and systems in relation to sustainability reporting.

verification_checks.description: 리스크 관리·내부통제의 범위·주요 특성·구성요소가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-5-36-(a) Scope, main features and components

rulebooks.section_name: GOV-5-36-(b) 리스크 평가 접근법·우선순위화 방법론
rulebooks.section_content: (b) the risk assessment approach followed, including the risk prioritisation methodology.

verification_checks.description: 리스크 평가 접근법 및 우선순위화 방법론이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-5-36-(b) Risk assessment approach and risk prioritisation methodology

verification_checks.description: 주요 리스크 및 완화 전략·관련 통제가 공시되었는지

verification_checks.description: 리스크 평가·내부통제 결과의 내부 기능·프로세스 통합 방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: GOV-5-36-(d) Integration of findings into internal functions and processes

rulebooks.section_name: AR 11 – 지속가능성 보고 내부통제·고려 가능 리스크(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: This Disclosure Requirement focuses solely on the internal control processes over the sustainability reporting process. The undertaking may consider risks such as the completeness and integrity of the data, the accuracy of estimation results, the availability of upstream and/or downstream value chain data, and the timing of the availability of the information.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 보고 관련 고려 가능 리스크 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 11 GOV-5 Internal control and risks to consider (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1 개요 – 전략·사업모델·가치사슬
rulebooks.section_content: Para 37: This chapter sets disclosure requirements that enable an understanding of: (a) the elements of the undertaking's strategy that relate to or affect sustainability matters, its business model and its value chain; (b) how the interests and views of stakeholders are taken into account; and (c) the outcome of the undertaking's assessment of material impacts, risks and opportunities. Paras 38-39: The undertaking shall disclose the elements of its strategy that relate to or impact sustainability matters, its business model and its value chain; objective is to describe key elements of general strategy, business model and value chain.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1 Strategy, business model and value chain (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40 개요 – 일반 전략의 주요 요소
rulebooks.section_content: Para 40: The undertaking shall disclose information about the key elements of its general strategy that relate to or affect sustainability matters: (a) description of products/services, markets, headcount, banned products; (b) revenue by ESRS sectors; (c) additional significant ESRS sectors; (d) fossil fuel, chemicals, controversial weapons, tobacco where applicable; (e) sustainability-related goals; (f) assessment vs goals; (g) strategy elements relating to sustainability.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40 Key elements of general strategy (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(a) 개요 – 제품·서비스·시장·인력 등
rulebooks.section_content: (a) a description of: (i) significant groups of products and/or services offered, including changes in the reporting period; (ii) significant markets and/or customer groups served, including changes; (iii) headcount of employees by geographical areas; and (iv) where applicable and material, products and services that are banned in certain markets.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(a) Description of products, markets, headcount (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(a)(i) 주요 제품·서비스군
rulebooks.section_content: (a)(i) significant groups of products and/or services offered, including changes in the reporting period (new/removed products and/or services).

verification_checks.description: 주요 제품·서비스군 및 변경이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(a)(i) Significant groups of products and/or services

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(a)(ii) 주요 시장·고객군
rulebooks.section_content: (a)(ii) significant markets and/or customer groups served, including changes in the reporting period (new/removed markets and/or customer groups).

verification_checks.description: 주요 시장·고객군 및 변경이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(a)(ii) Significant markets and/or customer groups

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(a)(iii) 지역별 직원 수
rulebooks.section_content: (a)(iii) headcount of employees by geographical areas.

verification_checks.description: 지역별 직원 수가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(a)(iii) Headcount of employees by geographical areas

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(a)(iv) 특정 시장 금지 제품·서비스
rulebooks.section_content: (a)(iv) where applicable and material, products and services that are banned in certain markets.

verification_checks.description: 해당·중요 시 특정 시장 금지 제품·서비스가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(a)(iv) Products and services banned in certain markets

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(b) 중요 ESRS 섹터별 매출
rulebooks.section_content: (b) a breakdown of total revenue, as included in its financial statements, by significant ESRS sectors. When the undertaking provides segment reporting as required by IFRS 8, this sector revenue information shall, as far as possible, be reconciled with IFRS 8 information.

verification_checks.description: 중요 ESRS 섹터별 매출(및 IFRS 8 조정)이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(b) Breakdown of total revenue by significant ESRS sectors

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(c) 추가 중요 ESRS 섹터 목록
rulebooks.section_content: (c) a list of the additional significant ESRS sectors beyond 40(b), in which the undertaking develops significant activities or is or may be connected to material impacts. Consistent with materiality assessment and sector-specific disclosure.

verification_checks.description: 추가 중요 ESRS 섹터 목록이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(c) List of additional significant ESRS sectors

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(d) 개요 – 화석연료·화학·논란무기·담배
rulebooks.section_content: (d) where applicable, a statement indicating, together with the related revenues, that the undertaking is active in: (i) the fossil fuel sector; (ii) chemicals production; (iii) controversial weapons; and/or (iv) the cultivation and production of tobacco.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(d) Fossil fuel, chemicals, controversial weapons, tobacco (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(d)(i) 화석연료 섹터
rulebooks.section_content: (d)(i) the fossil fuel (coal, oil and gas) sector, including disaggregation of revenues from coal, oil and gas, and Taxonomy-aligned economic activities related to fossil gas per Article 8(7)(a) of Delegated Regulation 2021/2178.

verification_checks.description: 해당 시 화석연료 섹터 및 매출 분석이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(d)(i) Fossil fuel sector

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(d)(ii) 화학품 생산
rulebooks.section_content: (d)(ii) chemicals production, i.e., activities fall under Division 20.2 of Annex I to Regulation (EC) No 1893/2006.

verification_checks.description: 해당 시 화학품 생산 활동이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(d)(ii) Chemicals production

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(d)(iii) 논란 무기
rulebooks.section_content: (d)(iii) controversial weapons (anti-personnel mines, cluster munitions, chemical weapons and biological weapons).

verification_checks.description: 해당 시 논란 무기 관련 활동이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(d)(iii) Controversial weapons

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(d)(iv) 담배 재배·생산
rulebooks.section_content: (d)(iv) the cultivation and production of tobacco.

verification_checks.description: 해당 시 담배 재배·생산이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(d)(iv) Cultivation and production of tobacco

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(e) 지속가능성 관련 목표
rulebooks.section_content: (e) its sustainability-related goals in terms of significant groups of products and services, customer categories, geographical areas and relationships with stakeholders.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 관련 목표가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(e) Sustainability-related goals

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(f) 현재 제품·시장과 목표의 관계 평가
rulebooks.section_content: (f) an assessment of its current significant products and/or services, and significant markets and customer groups, in relation to its sustainability-related goals.

verification_checks.description: 현재 제품·서비스·시장과 지속가능성 목표에 대한 평가가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(f) Assessment of current products and markets vs sustainability goals

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-40-(g) 지속가능성 관련 전략 요소
rulebooks.section_content: (g) the elements of the undertaking's strategy that relate to or impact sustainability matters, including the main challenges ahead, critical solutions or projects to be put in place, when relevant for sustainability reporting.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 관련 전략 요소·과제·해결책이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-40-(g) Elements of strategy relating to sustainability

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-41 40(b) 매출 분석 공시 면제
rulebooks.section_content: Para 41: If the undertaking is based in an EU Member State that allows for an exemption from the disclosure referred to in Article 18(1)(a) of Directive 2013/34/EU, and if the undertaking has made use of that exemption, it may omit the breakdown of revenue by significant ESRS sector required by paragraph 40(b). In this case the undertaking shall nevertheless disclose the list of ESRS sectors that are significant for the undertaking.

verification_checks.description: 면제 사용 시 중요 ESRS 섹터 목록이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-41 Exemption from revenue breakdown (where applicable)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-42 개요 – 사업모델 및 가치사슬
rulebooks.section_content: Para 42: The undertaking shall disclose a description of its business model and value chain, including: (a) its inputs and its approach to gathering, developing and securing those inputs; (b) its outputs and outcomes in terms of current and expected benefits for customers, investors and other stakeholders; and (c) the main features of its upstream and downstream value chain and the undertaking's position in its value chain, including main business actors and their relationship to the undertaking.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-42 Business model and value chain (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-42-(a) 투입요소 및 확보·개발 방식
rulebooks.section_content: (a) its inputs and its approach to gathering, developing and securing those inputs.

verification_checks.description: 투입요소 및 확보·개발 방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-42-(a) Inputs and approach to gathering, developing and securing inputs

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-42-(b) 산출·성과
rulebooks.section_content: (b) its outputs and outcomes in terms of current and expected benefits for customers, investors and other stakeholders.

verification_checks.description: 산출·성과(고객·투자자·이해관계자 혜택)가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-42-(b) Outputs and outcomes for customers, investors and stakeholders

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-1-42-(c) 가치사슬 주요 특징 및 기업 위치
rulebooks.section_content: (c) the main features of its upstream and downstream value chain and the undertaking's position in its value chain, including a description of the main business actors (key suppliers, customers, distribution channels and end-users) and their relationship to the undertaking. When the undertaking has multiple value chains, the disclosure shall cover the key value chains.

verification_checks.description: 가치사슬 주요 특징 및 기업의 위치가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-1-42-(c) Main features of value chain and undertaking's position

rulebooks.section_name: AR 12 – para 40 섹터 정보·ESRS 섹터에 따른 활동 매핑
rulebooks.section_content: To provide the information on sectors required by paragraph 40, the undertaking shall map its significant activities in accordance with ESRS sectors. If a code for a sub-sector does not exist, the caption "others" shall be used.

verification_checks.description: para 40 섹터 정보가 ESRS 섹터에 따라 매핑되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 12 SBM-1 Map activities in accordance with ESRS sectors

rulebooks.section_name: AR 13 – para 40 중요성 기준 (a)(b)
rulebooks.section_content: For the purposes of the disclosures required in paragraph 40, a group of products and/or services, markets and/or customer groups, or an ESRS sector, is significant if it meets one or both: (a) accounts for more than 10% of revenue; (b) connected with material actual impacts or material potential negative impacts.

verification_checks.description: para 40 중요성 기준 (a)(b) 적용 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 13 SBM-1 Significance criteria for paragraph 40

rulebooks.section_name: AR 13(a) 매출 10% 초과
rulebooks.section_content: AR 13(a): it accounts for more than 10 per cent of the undertaking's revenue.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 13(a) More than 10% of revenue

rulebooks.section_name: AR 13(b) 물질적 실제·잠재 부정적 영향과 연계
rulebooks.section_content: AR 13(b): it is connected with material actual impacts or material potential negative impacts of the undertaking.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 13(b) Connected with material impacts

rulebooks.section_name: AR 14 – 사업모델·가치사슬 공시 준비 시 고려 사항 (a)(b)(c)(d)
rulebooks.section_content: In preparing disclosures relating to business model and value chain, the undertaking shall consider: (a) key activities, resources, distribution channels and customer segments; (b) key business relationships and characteristics, including customers and suppliers; (c) cost structure and revenue of business segments, in line with IFRS 8 where applicable; (d) potential IRO in significant sector(s) and their relationship to business model or value chain.

verification_checks.description: AR 14 (a)(b)(c)(d) 고려 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 14 SBM-1 Considerations for business model and value chain

rulebooks.section_name: AR 15 – 가치사슬 맥락 정보·ESRS 1 ch 5·물질성 평가
rulebooks.section_content: Contextual information may be particularly relevant to understand to what extent disclosures include upstream and/or downstream value chain information. The description of main features of the value chain and identification of key value chains should support understanding of how the undertaking applies ESRS 1 chapter 5 and the materiality assessment in line with ESRS 1 chapter 3. The description may provide a high-level overview of key features of value chain entities, their relative contribution to performance and position, and how they contribute to value creation.

verification_checks.description: 가치사슬 맥락·ESRS 1 ch 5·ch 3 반영 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 15 SBM-1 Contextual information on value chain and ESRS 1 ch 5, ch 3

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2 개요 – 이해관계자의 이익 및 견해
rulebooks.section_content: Para 43: The undertaking shall disclose how the interests and views of its stakeholders are taken into account by the undertaking's strategy and business model. Para 44 (objective): to provide an understanding of how stakeholders' interests and views inform the undertaking's strategy and business model.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2 Interests and views of stakeholders (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45 개요 – 공시 항목
rulebooks.section_content: Para 45: The undertaking shall disclose a summarised description of: (a) its stakeholder engagement; (b) its understanding of the interests and views of key stakeholders as they relate to strategy and business model (see IRO-1); (c) where applicable, amendments to strategy and/or business model; (d) whether and how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about the views and interests of affected stakeholders regarding sustainability-related impacts.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45 Information to be disclosed (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45-(a) 개요 – 이해관계자 참여
rulebooks.section_content: (a) its stakeholder engagement, including: (i) the undertaking's key stakeholders; (ii) whether engagement with them occurs and for which categories of stakeholders; (iii) how it is organised; (iv) its purpose; and (v) how its outcome is taken into account by the undertaking.
