rulebooks.section_content: (a)(v) how its outcome is taken into account by the undertaking.

verification_checks.description: 참여 결과의 반영 방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45-(a)(v) How the outcome of engagement is taken into account

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45-(b) 주요 이해관계자 이익·견해에 대한 이해
rulebooks.section_content: (b) the undertaking's understanding of the interests and views of its key stakeholders as they relate to the undertaking's strategy and business model, to the extent that these were analysed during the undertaking's due diligence process and/or materiality assessment process (see Disclosure Requirement IRO-1 of this Standard).

verification_checks.description: 주요 이해관계자 이익·견해에 대한 이해가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45-(b) Understanding of interests and views of key stakeholders

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45-(c) 개요 – 전략·사업모델 수정(해당 시)
rulebooks.section_content: (c) where applicable, amendments to its strategy and/or business model, including: (i) how the undertaking has amended or expects to amend its strategy and/or business model to address the interests and views of its stakeholders; (ii) any further steps that are being planned and in what timeline; and (iii) whether these steps are likely to modify the relationship with and views of stakeholders.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45-(c) Amendments to strategy and/or business model (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45-(c)(i) 전략·사업모델 수정(이미 또는 예정)
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(i) how the undertaking has amended or expects to amend its strategy and/or business model to address the interests and views of its stakeholders.

verification_checks.description: 전략·사업모델 수정(이미 또는 예정)이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45-(c)(i) How amended or expects to amend strategy and/or business model

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45-(c)(ii) 추가 계획 및 일정
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(ii) any further steps that are being planned and in what timeline.

verification_checks.description: 추가 계획 및 일정이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45-(c)(ii) Further steps planned and timeline

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45-(c)(iii) 이해관계자 관계·견해 변경 가능성
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(iii) whether these steps are likely to modify the relationship with and views of stakeholders.

verification_checks.description: 이해관계자와의 관계·견해 변경 가능성이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45-(c)(iii) Whether steps are likely to modify relationship with and views of stakeholders

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-2-45-(d) 기관이 영향받은 이해관계자 견해·이익을 인지하는지
rulebooks.section_content: (d) whether and how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about the views and interests of affected stakeholders with regard to the undertaking's sustainability-related impacts.

verification_checks.description: 기관이 영향받은 이해관계자의 견해·이익을 인지하는지 여부·방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-2-45-(d) Whether and how the bodies are informed about views and interests of affected stakeholders

rulebooks.section_name: AR 16 – 이해관계자 견해·이익과 전략·사업모델(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: The views and interests of stakeholders expressed as part of the undertaking's engagement through its due diligence process may be relevant to one or more aspects of its strategy or business model. As such, they may affect the undertaking's decisions regarding the future direction of the strategy or business model.

verification_checks.description: 이해관계자 견해·이익이 전략·사업모델과 연관되어 공시된 경우(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 16 SBM-2 Stakeholder views relevant to strategy or business model (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3 개요 – 물질적 IRO와 전략·사업모델의 상호작용
rulebooks.section_content: Para 46: The undertaking shall disclose its material impacts, risks and opportunities and how they interact with its strategy and business model. Para 47 (objective): to provide an understanding of the material IRO as they result from the undertaking's materiality assessment and how they originate from and trigger adaptation of the undertaking's strategy and business model including its resources allocation.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3 Material IRO and their interaction with strategy and business model (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48 개요 – 공시 항목
rulebooks.section_content: Para 48: The undertaking shall disclose (a) brief description of material IRO and where concentrated; (b) current and anticipated effects and response; (c) material impacts (i)-(iv); (d) current financial effects; (e) anticipated financial effects and (e)(i)(ii); (f) resilience; (g) changes vs previous period; (h) ESRS vs entity-specific disclosures.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48 Information to be disclosed (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(a) 물질적 IRO 간략 설명 및 집중 위치
rulebooks.section_content: (a) a brief description of its material impacts, risks and opportunities resulting from its materiality assessment (see IRO-1), including where in its business model, own operations and upstream and downstream value chain these are concentrated.

verification_checks.description: 물질적 IRO에 대한 간략 설명 및 집중 위치가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(a) Brief description of material IRO and where concentrated

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(b) 효과 및 전략·사업모델 대응
rulebooks.section_content: (b) the current and anticipated effects of its material IRO on its business model, value chain, strategy and decision-making, and how it has responded or plans to respond, including any changes made or planned to its strategy or business model.

verification_checks.description: 효과 및 대응(전략·사업모델 변경 포함)이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(b) Current and anticipated effects and response

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(c) 개요 – 물질적 영향 상세
rulebooks.section_content: (c) with reference to the undertaking's material impacts: (i) how material negative and positive impacts affect or are likely to affect people or the environment; (ii) whether and how impacts originate from or are connected to strategy and business model; (iii) reasonably expected time horizons; (iv) whether involved through activities or business relationships and nature of those.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(c) Material impacts detail (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(c)(i) 영향이 사람·환경에 미치는 효과
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(i) how the undertaking's material negative and positive impacts affect (or, in the case of potential impacts, are likely to affect) people or the environment.

verification_checks.description: 물질적 영향이 사람·환경에 미치는(또는 미칠) 효과가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(c)(i) How material impacts affect people or the environment

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(c)(ii) 영향의 전략·사업모델 기원·연결
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(ii) whether and how the impacts originate from or are connected to the undertaking's strategy and business model.

verification_checks.description: 영향이 전략·사업모델에서 기인하거나 연결되는지가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(c)(ii) Whether and how impacts originate from or are connected to strategy and business model

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(c)(iii) 영향의 시간 범위
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(iii) the reasonably expected time horizons of the impacts.

verification_checks.description: 영향의 합리적으로 예상되는 시간 범위가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(c)(iii) Reasonably expected time horizons of the impacts

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(c)(iv) 활동·사업적 관계를 통한 관여
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(iv) whether the undertaking is involved with the material impacts through its activities or because of its business relationships, describing the nature of the activities or business relationships concerned.

verification_checks.description: 활동 또는 사업적 관계를 통한 관여 및 그 성격이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(c)(iv) Whether involved through activities or business relationships

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(d) 현재 재무적 효과
rulebooks.section_content: (d) the current financial effects of the undertaking's material risks and opportunities on its financial position, financial performance and cash flows and the material risks and opportunities for which there is a significant risk of a material adjustment within the next annual reporting period to the carrying amounts of assets and liabilities reported in the related financial statements.

verification_checks.description: 물질적 리스크·기회의 현재 재무적 효과가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(d) Current financial effects of material risks and opportunities

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(e) 개요 – 예상 재무적 효과
rulebooks.section_content: (e) the anticipated financial effects of the undertaking's material risks and opportunities on its financial position, financial performance and cash flows over the short-, medium- and long-term, including time horizons; how the undertaking expects its financial position, performance and cash flows to change given its strategy to manage risks and opportunities, taking into consideration (i) investment and disposal plans and (ii) planned sources of funding.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(e) Anticipated financial effects (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(e)(i) 투자·처분 계획
rulebooks.section_content: (e)(i) its investment and disposal plans (e.g. capital expenditure, major acquisitions and divestments, joint ventures, business transformation, innovation, new business areas and asset retirements), including plans the undertaking is not contractually committed to.

verification_checks.description: 투자·처분 계획이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(e)(i) Investment and disposal plans

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(e)(ii) 계획된 자금 조달 원천
rulebooks.section_content: (e)(ii) its planned sources of funding to implement its strategy.

verification_checks.description: 계획된 자금 조달 원천이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(e)(ii) Planned sources of funding

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(f) 전략·사업모델의 회복력
rulebooks.section_content: (f) information about the resilience of the undertaking's strategy and business model regarding its capacity to address its material impacts and risks and to take advantage of its material opportunities. A qualitative and, when applicable, quantitative analysis of the resilience, including how the analysis was conducted and the time horizons applied (ESRS 1 chapter 6). When providing quantitative information, the undertaking may disclose single amounts or ranges.

verification_checks.description: 전략·사업모델의 회복력에 대한 정성·정량 분석이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(f) Resilience of strategy and business model

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(g) 이전 기간 대비 물질적 IRO 변경
rulebooks.section_content: (g) changes to the material impacts, risks and opportunities compared to the previous reporting period.

verification_checks.description: 이전 보고 기간 대비 물질적 IRO 변경이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(g) Changes to material IRO compared to previous period

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-48-(h) ESRS 대비 기업별 공시 구분
rulebooks.section_content: (h) a specification of those impacts, risks and opportunities that are covered by ESRS Disclosure Requirements as opposed to those covered by the undertaking using additional entity-specific disclosures.

verification_checks.description: ESRS 공시 요건 대비 기업별 공시 구분이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-48-(h) Specification of IRO covered by ESRS vs entity-specific

rulebooks.section_name: SBM-3-49 서술 정보의 topical ESRS와 병기
rulebooks.section_content: Para 49: The undertaking may disclose the descriptive information required in paragraph 46 alongside the disclosures provided under the corresponding topical ESRS, in which case it shall still present a statement of its material impacts, risks and opportunities alongside its disclosures prepared under this chapter of ESRS 2.

verification_checks.description: 병기 시에도 물질적 IRO에 대한 성명이 본 장 공시와 함께 제시되는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: SBM-3-49 Descriptive information alongside topical ESRS

rulebooks.section_name: AR 17 – 가치사슬 내 물질적 IRO 집중 위치 고려
rulebooks.section_content: When describing where in its upstream and/or downstream value chain material impacts, risks and opportunities are concentrated, the undertaking shall consider: geographical areas, facilities or types of assets, inputs, outputs and distribution channels.

verification_checks.description: 가치사슬 내 IRO 집중 위치(지역·시설·자산·투입·산출·유통) 고려 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 17 SBM-3 Where in value chain material IRO are concentrated

rulebooks.section_name: AR 18 – 단일 또는 집계된 IRO로 공시(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: This disclosure may be expressed in terms of a single impact, risk or opportunity or by aggregating groups of material impacts, risks and opportunities, when this provides more relevant information and does not obscure material information.

verification_checks.description: 단일 IRO 또는 집계로 공시 시 관련성·물질 정보 은폐 여부(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 18 SBM-3 Single or aggregated IRO (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: 4.1 물질성 평가 프로세스에 대한 공시(장 목적)
rulebooks.section_content: Para 50: This chapter sets disclosure requirements that enable an understanding of: (a) the process to identify material impacts, risks and opportunities; and (b) the information that, as a result of its materiality assessment, the undertaking has included in its sustainability statement.

validation_rules.paragraph_reference: ESRS 2 - Impact, risk and opportunity management, 4.1 (para 50)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: 4.1 Disclosures on the materiality assessment process (chapter objective)

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1 개요 – 물질적 IRO 식별·평가 프로세스 설명
rulebooks.section_content: Para 51: The undertaking shall disclose its process to identify its impacts, risks and opportunities and to assess which ones are material. Para 52 (objective): to provide an understanding of the process through which the undertaking identifies IRO and assesses their materiality, as the basis for determining the disclosures in its sustainability statement (see ESRS 1 chapter 3 and related Application Requirements, double materiality).
rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1 Description of the process to identify and assess material IRO (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53 개요 – 공시 항목
rulebooks.section_content: Para 53: The undertaking shall disclose (a) methodologies and assumptions; (b) overview of process for impacts on people and the environment (impact materiality), including (i)-(iv); (c) overview of process for risks and opportunities with financial effects, including (i)-(iii); (d) decision-making process and internal control procedures; (e) integration of impacts/risks process into overall risk management; (f) integration of opportunities process into overall management where applicable; (g) input parameters; (h) changes vs prior period, when last modified and future revision dates.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53 Information to be disclosed (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(a) 방법론 및 가정
rulebooks.section_content: (a) a description of the methodologies and assumptions applied in the described process.

verification_checks.description: 적용된 방법론 및 가정이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(a) Methodologies and assumptions

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(b) 개요 – 사람·환경에 대한 영향 프로세스
rulebooks.section_content: (b) an overview of the process to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor the undertaking's potential and actual impacts on people and the environment, informed by due diligence, including whether and how the process: (i) focusses on heightened risk factors; (ii) considers impacts through own operations or business relationships; (iii) includes consultation with affected stakeholders and external experts; (iv) prioritises negative/positive impacts and determines materiality (ESRS 1 section 3.4).

key_terms: impacts on people and the environment

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(b) Process for impacts on people and the environment (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(b)(i) 고위험 활동·관계·지역 등에 대한 집중
rulebooks.section_content: (b)(i) focusses on specific activities, business relationships, geographies or other factors that give rise to heightened risk of adverse impacts.

verification_checks.description: 고위험 요인에 대한 집중 여부·방식이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(b)(i) Focus on heightened risk factors

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(b)(ii) 자체 운영·사업적 관계를 통한 관여 고려
rulebooks.section_content: (b)(ii) considers the impacts with which the undertaking is involved through its own operations or as a result of its business relationships.

verification_checks.description: 자체 운영·사업적 관계를 통한 관여 고려가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(b)(ii) Considers impacts through own operations or business relationships

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(b)(iii) 영향받은 이해관계자·외부 전문가 협의
rulebooks.section_content: (b)(iii) includes consultation with affected stakeholders to understand how they may be impacted and with external experts.

verification_checks.description: 영향받은 이해관계자 및 외부 전문가와의 협의가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(b)(iii) Consultation with affected stakeholders and external experts

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(b)(iv) 영향 우선순위화 및 물질성 판단
rulebooks.section_content: (b)(iv) prioritises negative impacts based on their relative severity and likelihood (see ESRS 1 section 3.4 Impact materiality) and, if applicable, positive impacts on their relative scale, scope and likelihood, and determines which sustainability matters are material for reporting purposes, including the qualitative or quantitative thresholds and other criteria used as prescribed by ESRS 1 section 3.4 Impact materiality.

verification_checks.description: 영향 우선순위화 및 물질성 판단(기준·임계값 포함)이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(b)(iv) Prioritises impacts and determines materiality

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(c) 개요 – 재무적 효과가 있는 리스크·기회 프로세스
rulebooks.section_content: (c) an overview of the process used to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor risks and opportunities that have or may have financial effects. The disclosure shall include: (i) how the undertaking has considered the connections of its impacts and dependencies with the risks and opportunities that may arise from those impacts and dependencies; (ii) how the undertaking assesses the likelihood, magnitude, and nature of effects (ESRS 1 section 3.3 Financial materiality); (iii) how the undertaking prioritises sustainability-related risks relative to other types of risks, including use of risk-assessment tools.
rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(c) Process for risks and opportunities with financial effects (overview)

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(c)(i) 영향·의존성과 리스크·기회의 연계
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(i) how the undertaking has considered the connections of its impacts and dependencies with the risks and opportunities that may arise from those impacts and dependencies.

verification_checks.description: 영향·의존성과 리스크·기회의 연계 고려가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(c)(i) Connections of impacts and dependencies with risks and opportunities

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(c)(ii) 가능성·규모·성격 평가
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(ii) how the undertaking assesses the likelihood, magnitude, and nature of effects of the identified risks and opportunities (such as the qualitative or quantitative thresholds and other criteria used as prescribed by ESRS 1 section 3.3 Financial materiality).

verification_checks.description: 식별된 리스크·기회의 가능성·규모·성격 평가가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(c)(ii) Assessment of likelihood, magnitude and nature of effects

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(c)(iii) 지속가능성 관련 리스크 우선순위
rulebooks.section_content: (c)(iii) how the undertaking prioritises sustainability-related risks relative to other types of risks, including its use of risk-assessment tools.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 관련 리스크의 타 리스크 대비 우선순위가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(c)(iii) Prioritisation of sustainability-related risks

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(d) 의사결정 프로세스 및 내부통제 절차
rulebooks.section_content: (d) a description of the decision-making process and the related internal control procedures.

verification_checks.description: 의사결정 프로세스 및 관련 내부통제 절차가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(d) Decision-making process and internal control procedures

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(e) 영향·리스크 프로세스의 전사 리스크 관리 통합
rulebooks.section_content: (e) the extent to which and how the process to identify, assess and manage impacts and risks is integrated into the undertaking's overall risk management process and used to evaluate the undertaking's overall risk profile and risk management processes.

verification_checks.description: 영향·리스크 프로세스의 전사 리스크 관리 통합이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(e) Integration of impacts and risks process into overall risk management

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(f) 기회 프로세스의 전사 경영 통합
rulebooks.section_content: (f) the extent to which and how the process to identify, assess and manage opportunities is integrated into the undertaking's overall management process where applicable.

verification_checks.description: 기회 프로세스의 전사 경영 통합이 해당 시 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(f) Integration of opportunities process into overall management

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(g) 사용 입력 파라미터
rulebooks.section_content: (g) the input parameters it uses (for example, data sources, the scope of operations covered and the detail used in assumptions).

verification_checks.description: 사용 입력 파라미터가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(g) Input parameters used

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-1-53-(h) 이전 기간 대비 변경·최종 수정·향후 개정
rulebooks.section_content: (h) whether and how the process has changed compared to the prior reporting period, when the process was modified for the last time and future revision dates of the materiality assessment.

verification_checks.description: 이전 기간 대비 변경·최종 수정 시기·향후 개정 일정이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-1-53-(h) Whether and how process has changed, when last modified and future revision dates

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-2 Disclosure Requirements in ESRS covered by the undertaking's sustainability statement
rulebooks.section_content: Para 54: The undertaking shall report on the Disclosure Requirements complied with in its sustainability statements. Para 55: The objective is to provide an understanding of the Disclosure Requirements included in the undertaking's sustainability statement and of the topics that have been omitted as not material, as a result of the materiality assessment.

verification_checks.description: 지속가능성 보고서가 다루는 공시 요건에 대한 보고가 있는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-2 Disclosure Requirements in ESRS covered by the undertaking's sustainability statement

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-2-56 List of Disclosure Requirements and table of Appendix B datapoints
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking shall include a list of the Disclosure Requirements complied with, including page numbers and/or paragraphs where the related disclosures are located (may be presented as a content index). The undertaking shall also include a table of all the datapoints that derive from other EU legislation as listed in Appendix B, indicating where they can be found and including those assessed as not material (indicate "Not material" per ESRS 1 paragraph 35).

verification_checks.description: 준수한 공시 요건 목록 및 부록 B 데이터포인트 표가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-2-56 List of Disclosure Requirements complied with and table of Appendix B datapoints

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-2-57 Climate change not material - detailed explanation
rulebooks.section_content: If the undertaking concludes that climate change is not material and therefore omits all disclosure requirements in ESRS E1 Climate change, it shall disclose a detailed explanation of the conclusions of its materiality assessment with regard to climate change, including a forward-looking analysis of the conditions that could lead the undertaking to conclude that climate change is material in the future.

verification_checks.description: 기후변화가 비물질인 경우 상세 설명 및 전망 분석이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-2-57 Detailed explanation when climate change is not material

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-2-58 Other topic not material - brief explanation (optional)
rulebooks.section_content: If the undertaking concludes that a topic other than climate change is not material and therefore omits all the Disclosure Requirements in the corresponding topical ESRS, it may provide a brief explanation of the conclusions of its materiality assessment for that topic.

verification_checks.description: 기타 주제 비물질 시 간략 설명 제공 여부(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-2-58 Brief explanation when topic other than climate change is not material (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: IRO-2-59 Explanation of how material information was determined
rulebooks.section_content: The undertaking shall provide an explanation of how it has determined the material information to be disclosed in relation to the impacts, risks and opportunities that it has assessed to be material, including the use of thresholds and/or how it has implemented the criteria in ESRS 1 section 3.2 Material matters and materiality of information.

key_terms: Material matters and materiality of information

verification_checks.description: 물질적 정보 결정 방식(임계값·ESRS 1 §3.2 기준) 설명이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: IRO-2-59 Explanation of how material information to be disclosed was determined

rulebooks.section_name: AR 19 – 준수한 공시 요건 목록·목차 위치 및 표 형태(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: Notwithstanding ESRS 1 chapter 8, the undertaking may disclose the list of the Disclosure Requirements complied with (see paragraph 54) in the general information part or in other parts of the sustainability statement as it deems appropriate. The undertaking may use a content index, i.e., a tabular list of the Disclosure Requirements included in the sustainability statement, with the indication of where they are located (page/paragraphs).

verification_checks.description: 준수한 공시 요건 목록·목차 위치·표 형태 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 19 IRO-2 List and content index location (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: 4.2 Minimum disclosure requirements on policies and actions (paras 60-62)
rulebooks.section_content: Para 60: This section sets out minimum disclosure requirements to be included when the undertaking discloses information on its policies and actions to manage material sustainability matters. They shall be applied together with the Disclosure Requirements in the relevant topical and sector-specific ESRS and when preparing entity-specific disclosures. Para 61: The corresponding disclosures shall be located alongside disclosures prescribed by the relevant ESRS; when a single policy or same actions address several interconnected sustainability matters, the undertaking may disclose under one topical ESRS and cross reference in others. Para 62: If the undertaking cannot disclose the information on policies and actions required because it has not adopted policies and/or actions, it shall disclose this and provide reasons; it may disclose a timeframe in which it aims to adopt them.

verification_checks.description: 정책·조치 관련 최소 공시 요건이 topical/sector ESRS와 함께 적용·위치·미채택 시 이유·시한이 반영되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: 4.2 Minimum disclosure requirements on policies and actions

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-P Policies adopted to manage material sustainability matters
rulebooks.section_content: Para 63: The undertaking shall apply the minimum disclosure requirements defined in this provision when it discloses the policies it has in place with regard to each sustainability matter identified as material. Para 64 (objective): to provide an understanding of the policies that the undertaking has in place to prevent, mitigate and remediate actual and potential impacts, to address risks and to pursue opportunities. Para 65: The undertaking shall disclose information about policies adopted to manage material sustainability matters. The disclosure shall include (a) to (f).

verification_checks.description: 물질적 지속가능성 사항별 채택 정책에 대한 공시가 (a)-(f) 포함되어 있는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-P Policies adopted to manage material sustainability matters

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-P-65-(a) Key contents, objectives, impacts/risks/opportunities, monitoring
rulebooks.section_content: (a) a description of the key contents of the policy, including its general objectives and which material impacts, risks or opportunities the policy relates to and the process for monitoring.

verification_checks.description: 정책의 주요 내용·목표·관련 영향·리스크·기회·모니터링 절차가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-P-65-(a) Key contents of the policy, objectives, monitoring

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-P-65-(b) Scope or exclusions of the policy
rulebooks.section_content: (b) a description of the scope of the policy, or of its exclusions, in terms of activities, upstream and/or downstream value chain, geographies and if relevant, affected stakeholder groups.

verification_checks.description: 정책의 적용 범위 또는 제외가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-P-65-(b) Scope of the policy or exclusions

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-P-65-(c) Most senior level accountable for implementation
rulebooks.section_content: (c) the most senior level in the undertaking's organisation that is accountable for the implementation of the policy.

verification_checks.description: 정책 이행 책임 최고 수준이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-P-65-(c) Most senior level accountable for implementation

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-P-65-(d) Third-party standards or initiatives
rulebooks.section_content: (d) a reference, if relevant, to the third-party standards or initiatives the undertaking commits to respect through the implementation of the policy.

verification_checks.description: 관련 시 제3자 기준·이니셔티브 참조가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-P-65-(d) Reference to third-party standards or initiatives

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-P-65-(e) Consideration of key stakeholders' interests
rulebooks.section_content: (e) if relevant, a description of the consideration given to the interests of key stakeholders in setting the policy.

verification_checks.description: 관련 시 핵심 이해관계자 이익 고려가 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-P-65-(e) Consideration given to the interests of key stakeholders

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-P-65-(f) Availability of the policy to stakeholders
rulebooks.section_content: (f) if relevant, whether and how the undertaking makes the policy available to potentially affected stakeholders, and stakeholders who need to help implement it.

verification_checks.description: 관련 시 정책의 이해관계자 제공 여부·방법이 공시되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-P-65-(f) Whether and how the policy is made available to stakeholders

rulebooks.section_name: AR 20 – 단일 정책이 여러 topical ESRS에 적용 시 한 섹션 공시·상호참조(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: Due to the interdependency between impacts on people and the environment, risks and opportunities, a single policy may apply to several material sustainability matters, including matters addressed by more than one topical ESRS. The undertaking may report on the policy in one section (e.g. environmental) and include a cross-reference in another (e.g. social), or vice versa.

verification_checks.description: 단일 정책 한 섹션 공시·타 섹션 상호참조(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 20 MDR-P Single policy and cross-reference (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 21 – 정책 범위 설명·경계·가치사슬 적용 범위(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: The description of the scope of the policy may explain which activities and/or segments of the undertaking's own operations or upstream and downstream value chain it concerns. The description may also explain further boundaries relevant to the specific topic or the undertaking's circumstances (geographies, life cycles, etc.). If the policy does not cover the full value chain, the undertaking may provide clear information regarding the extent of the value chain covered by the policy.

verification_checks.description: 정책 범위·경계·가치사슬 적용 범위 설명(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 21 MDR-P Scope of policy and value chain extent (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A Actions and resources in relation to material sustainability matters
rulebooks.section_content: Para 66: The undertaking shall apply the requirements when it describes the actions through which it manages each material sustainability matter including action plans and resources allocated and/or planned. Para 67 (objective): to provide an understanding of the key actions taken and/or planned to prevent, mitigate and remediate impacts and to address risks and opportunities, and where applicable achieve the objectives and targets of related policies. Paras 68-69: Where policy requires actions or action plan (or actions without a specific policy), disclose 68(a)-(e); where action plan requires significant Opex and/or Capex, disclose 69(a)-(c).

verification_checks.description: 물질적 지속가능성 사항 관련 조치·자원(68(a)-(e), 69(a)-(c)) 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A Actions and resources in relation to material sustainability matters

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-68-(a) Key actions, expected outcomes, policy objectives
rulebooks.section_content: (a) the list of key actions taken in the reporting year and planned for the future, their expected outcomes and, where relevant, how their implementation contributes to the achievement of policy objectives and targets.

verification_checks.description: 핵심 조치 목록·기대 결과·정책 목표 달성 기여 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-68-(a) List of key actions, expected outcomes, contribution to policy objectives

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-68-(b) Scope of the key actions
rulebooks.section_content: (b) the scope of the key actions (i.e., coverage in terms of activities, upstream and/or downstream value chain, geographies and, where applicable, affected stakeholder groups).

verification_checks.description: 핵심 조치의 적용 범위 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-68-(b) Scope of the key actions

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-68-(c) Time horizons for completing each key action
rulebooks.section_content: (c) the time horizons under which the undertaking intends to complete each key action.

verification_checks.description: 핵심 조치 완료 예정 시한 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-68-(c) Time horizons for completing each key action

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-68-(d) Actions for remedy for those harmed
rulebooks.section_content: (d) if applicable, key actions taken (along with results) to provide for and cooperate in or support the provision of remedy for those harmed by actual material impacts.

verification_checks.description: 적용 시 피해자 구제 관련 조치·결과 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-68-(d) Key actions for remedy for those harmed

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-68-(e) Progress of actions or action plans from prior periods
rulebooks.section_content: (e) if applicable, quantitative and qualitative information regarding the progress of actions or action plans disclosed in prior periods.

verification_checks.description: 적용 시 이전 기간 조치·실행계획 진행 현황 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-68-(e) Progress of actions or action plans from prior periods

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-69-(a) Current and future resources, sustainable finance, preconditions
rulebooks.section_content: (a) describe the type of current and future financial and other resources allocated to the action plan, including if applicable, the relevant terms of sustainable finance instruments (e.g. green bonds, social bonds, green loans), the environmental or social objectives, and whether the ability to implement the actions or action plan depends on specific preconditions.

verification_checks.description: 실행계획 관련 자원·지속가능 금융·선행조건 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-69-(a) Type of current and future resources, sustainable finance instruments

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-69-(b) Amount of current financial resources and relation to financial statements
rulebooks.section_content: (b) provide the amount of current financial resources and explain how they relate to the most relevant amounts presented in the financial statements.

verification_checks.description: 현재 재정 자원 금액 및 재무제표 연계 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-69-(b) Amount of current financial resources and relation to financial statements

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-A-69-(c) Amount of future financial resources
rulebooks.section_content: (c) provide the amount of future financial resources.

verification_checks.description: 미래 재정 자원 금액 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-A-69-(c) Amount of future financial resources

rulebooks.section_name: AR 22 – 핵심 조치의 정의·적절한 경우 집계(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: Key actions in the context of this Minimum Disclosure Requirement are those actions that materially contribute to achieving the undertaking's objectives in addressing material impacts, risks and opportunities. For reasons of understandability, key actions may be aggregated where appropriate.

verification_checks.description: 핵심 조치 정의·집계 적용(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 22 MDR-A Key actions and aggregation (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 23 – 자원 배분 정보의 표 제시·Capex·Opex·시한별(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: Information on resource allocation may be presented in the form of a table and broken down between capital expenditure and operating expenditure, and across the relevant time horizons, and between resources applied in the current reporting year and the planned allocation of resources over specific time horizons.

verification_checks.description: 자원 배분 표·Capex/Opex·시한별 제시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 23 MDR-A Resource allocation table (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-M Metrics in relation to material sustainability matters
rulebooks.section_content: Para 73: The undertaking shall apply the requirements when it discloses on the metrics it has in place with regard to each material sustainability matter. Para 74 (objective): to provide an understanding of the metrics the undertaking uses to track the effectiveness of its actions to manage material sustainability matters. Para 75: The undertaking shall disclose any metrics that it uses to evaluate performance and effectiveness, in relation to a material impact, risk or opportunity. Para 76: Metrics shall include those defined in ESRS, as well as entity-specific metrics from other sources or developed by the undertaking. Para 77: For each metric, disclose (a)-(d).

verification_checks.description: 물질적 지속가능성 사항 관련 지표 및 77(a)-(d) 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-M Metrics in relation to material sustainability matters

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-M-77-(a) Methodologies, assumptions and limitations
rulebooks.section_content: (a) disclose the methodologies and significant assumptions behind the metric, including the limitations of the methodologies used.

verification_checks.description: 지표의 방법론·중요 가정·한계 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-M-77-(a) Methodologies and significant assumptions behind the metric

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-M-77-(b) External validation of measurement
rulebooks.section_content: (b) disclose whether the measurement of the metric is validated by an external body other than the assurance provider and, if so, which body.

verification_checks.description: 지표 측정의 외부 검증 여부·검증 기관 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-M-77-(b) Whether measurement is validated by external body

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-M-77-(c) Label and define the metric
rulebooks.section_content: (c) label and define the metric using meaningful, clear and precise names and descriptions.

verification_checks.description: 지표의 명칭·정의 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-M-77-(c) Label and define the metric

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-M-77-(d) Presentation currency when currency is unit of measure
rulebooks.section_content: (d) when currency is specified as the unit of measure, use the presentation currency of its financial statements.

verification_checks.description: 통화 단위 사용 시 재무제표 표시통화 사용 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-M-77-(d) Use presentation currency when currency is unit of measure

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T Tracking effectiveness of policies and actions through targets
rulebooks.section_content: Para 78: The undertaking shall apply the requirements when it discloses information about the targets it has set with regard to each material sustainability matter. Para 79 (objective): understanding of (a) tracking effectiveness and metrics; (b) measurable time-bound outcome-oriented targets; (c) progress towards targets; (d) if no targets, how it tracks effectiveness; (e) stakeholder involvement. Paras 80-81: Disclose targets per 80(a)-(j); if no targets, per 81(a)-(b) including (i)-(ii).

verification_checks.description: 목표 관련 MDR-T 공시(80(a)-(j) 또는 81(a)-(b)) 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T Tracking effectiveness of policies and actions through targets

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(a) Relationship of target to policy objectives
rulebooks.section_content: (a) a description of the relationship of the target to the policy objectives.

verification_checks.description: 목표와 정책 목표 간 관계 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(a) Relationship of target to policy objectives

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(b) Defined target level, absolute or relative, unit
rulebooks.section_content: (b) the defined target level to be achieved, including, where applicable, whether the target is absolute or relative and in which unit it is measured.

verification_checks.description: 목표 수준·절대/상대·단위 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(b) Defined target level

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(c) Scope of the target
rulebooks.section_content: (c) the scope of the target, including the undertaking's activities and/or its upstream and/or downstream value chain where applicable and geographical boundaries.

verification_checks.description: 목표 적용 범위 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(c) Scope of the target

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(d) Baseline value and base year
rulebooks.section_content: (d) the baseline value and base year from which progress is measured.

verification_checks.description: 기준값·기준 연도 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(d) Baseline value and base year

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(e) Period, milestones or interim targets
rulebooks.section_content: (e) the period to which the target applies and if applicable, any milestones or interim targets.

verification_checks.description: 기간·마일스톤·중간 목표 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(e) Period, milestones or interim targets

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(f) Methodologies, assumptions, scenario, alignment
rulebooks.section_content: (f) the methodologies and significant assumptions used to define targets, including where applicable, the selected scenario, data sources, alignment with national, EU or international policy goals and how the targets consider the wider context of sustainable development and/or local situation.

verification_checks.description: 방법론·가정·시나리오·정합성 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(f) Methodologies and assumptions for targets

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(g) Environmental targets and scientific evidence
rulebooks.section_content: (g) whether the undertaking's targets related to environmental matters are based on conclusive scientific evidence.

verification_checks.description: 환경 목표의 과학적 근거 여부 공시

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(g) Environmental targets based on scientific evidence

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(h) Stakeholder involvement in target setting
rulebooks.section_content: (h) whether and how stakeholders have been involved in target setting for each material sustainability matter.

verification_checks.description: 목표 설정 시 이해관계자 참여 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(h) Stakeholder involvement in target setting

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(i) Changes in targets, rationale, comparability
rulebooks.section_content: (i) any changes in targets and corresponding metrics or underlying measurement methodologies, significant assumptions, limitations, sources and processes to collect data adopted within the defined time horizon. This includes an explanation of the rationale for those changes and their effect on comparability (see BP-2).

verification_checks.description: 목표·지표 등 변경·근거·비교가능성 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(i) Changes in targets and effect on comparability

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-80-(j) Performance against targets, monitoring, trends
rulebooks.section_content: (j) the performance against its disclosed targets, including information on how the target is monitored and reviewed and the metrics used, whether the progress is in line with what had been initially planned, and an analysis of trends or significant changes in the performance towards achieving the target.

verification_checks.description: 목표 대비 실적·모니터링·추세 분석 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-80-(j) Performance against disclosed targets

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-81-(a) No targets: timeframe for setting or reasons
rulebooks.section_content: (a) it may disclose whether such targets will be set and the timeframe for setting them, or the reasons why the undertaking does not plan to set such targets.

verification_checks.description: 목표 미설정 시 설정 예정·시한 또는 사유 공시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-81-(a) Whether targets will be set and timeframe or reasons

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-81-(b) Tracks effectiveness without targets; processes and indicators
rulebooks.section_content: (b) it shall disclose whether it nevertheless tracks the effectiveness of its policies and actions in relation to the material sustainability-related impact, risk and opportunity, and if so: (i) any processes through which it does so; (ii) the defined level of ambition to be achieved and any qualitative or quantitative indicators it uses to evaluate progress, including the base period from which progress is measured.

verification_checks.description: 목표 미설정 시 효과 추적 여부·절차·지표 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-81-(b) Whether and how it tracks effectiveness without targets

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-81-(b)(i) Processes to track effectiveness
rulebooks.section_content: (i) any processes through which it does so.

verification_checks.description: 효과 추적 절차 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-81-(b)(i) Processes through which it tracks effectiveness

rulebooks.section_name: MDR-T-81-(b)(ii) Level of ambition and indicators, base period
rulebooks.section_content: (ii) the defined level of ambition to be achieved and any qualitative or quantitative indicators it uses to evaluate progress, including the base period from which progress is measured.

verification_checks.description: 목표 수준·정성·정량 지표·기준 기간 공시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: MDR-T-81-(b)(ii) Level of ambition and indicators

rulebooks.section_name: AR 24 – 환경 목표 절대 우선·사회 목표 인권·후생 등
rulebooks.section_content: When disclosing targets related to the prevention or mitigation of environmental impacts, the undertaking shall prioritise targets related to the reduction of the impacts in absolute terms rather than in relative terms. When targets address the prevention or mitigation of social impacts, they may be specified in terms of the effects on human rights, welfare or positive outcomes for affected stakeholders.

verification_checks.description: 환경 목표 절대 감축 우선·사회 목표 인권·후생 등 명시 여부

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 24 MDR-T Environmental absolute vs relative; social human rights, welfare

rulebooks.section_name: AR 25 – 목표 달성 진행 현황의 종합 표(선택)
rulebooks.section_content: The information on progress made towards achieving the targets may be presented in a comprehensive table, including information on the baseline and target value, milestones, and achieved performance over the prior periods.

verification_checks.description: 목표 달성 진행 현황 종합 표 제시(선택)

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 25 MDR-T Progress in comprehensive table (optional)

rulebooks.section_name: AR 26 – 측정 가능 목표 없이 정책 목표 진행 시 기준·평가
rulebooks.section_content: Where the undertaking describes progress in achieving the objectives of a policy in the absence of a measurable target, it may specify a baseline against which the progress is considered. The baseline and the assessment of the progress shall be related to the impacts, risks and opportunities which underpin the materiality of the matter addressed by the policy.

verification_checks.description: 측정 가능 목표 없을 때 기준·평가가 IRO·물질성과 연계되었는지

rulebooks.rulebook_title: AR 26 MDR-T Progress without measurable target, baseline and assessment
